submitted_payload.details_summary: Submitted Ralph Workflow as a coding-agent / agentic-workflows suggestion with Codeberg primary, GitHub mirror, open-source positioning, and a finished-tested-ready-to-review workflow angle.

verification.execution_method: Direct POST to the live Formspree-backed suggestion form on the AI for Code homepage.

why_this_action: Codeberg adoption is still flat in adoption_metrics_latest.md, so a fresh third-party discovery surface is more valuable than another internal packet refresh.
AI for Code is an untouched developer-facing AI tools directory with explicit coding-agent and agentic-workflow coverage plus a live suggestion form.
The lane was directly executable from this runtime without waiting on GitHub auth, Reddit unblocks, or StackOverflow posting access.
expected_outcome: A qualified directory listing or follow-up mention that routes evaluators to the Codeberg repo first.
replacement_condition: If AI for Code has not listed Ralph Workflow or created any visible referral/backlink evidence by 2026-06-06, treat this lane as pending-only and use the next fresh-action slot on another untouched high-intent surface.
